<includeonly>Submittal {{{number}}}{{#if:{{{status|}}}| — {{{status}}}}}{{#if:{{{date|}}}| ({{{date}}})}}{{#if:{{{note|}}}| — {{{note}}}}}</includeonly><noinclude>
== Usage ==
<code><nowiki>{{Cite submittal|number=SUB-033000-001|date=2026-02-10|status=Approved as Noted|note=Concrete mix design, 4500 PSI structural}}</nowiki></code>

Renders as: Submittal SUB-033000-001 — Approved as Noted (2026-02-10) — Concrete mix design, 4500 PSI structural

=== Parameters ===
* '''number''' (required): Submittal number
* '''date''' (required): Review/approval date
* '''status''' (required): Approved, Approved as Noted, Revise and Resubmit, Rejected
* '''note''' (optional): What was submitted

[[Category:Citation templates]]
</noinclude>
